caption: A panel of five people is seated and standing on a stage in a presentation hall filled with rows of blue and grey seats. The setting features a large white screen in the background and "mediasite" logos at the top. A banner with the text "stronger together" is visible behind the panel. From left to right, the group includes a man in a dark suit, a woman in a dark top, a man in a brown jacket and dark pants, a woman in a blue jacket, and a man in a dark blazer. Small white round tables are placed in front of several participants. Black audio equipment and speakers are positioned on the stage. Throughout the sequence, the participants remain largely stationary in their positions, with slight shifts in posture and gestures as they engage in a discussion. The scene remains consistent across the frames with no significant changes in location or personnel.
